name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible problem with the application

labels: bug
assignees: ''

## Description
[A clear description of what the bug is]

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Enter '...'
4. Observe the error

## Expected Behavior
[What should have happened]

## Actual Behavior
[What actually happened - include error messages verbatim]

## Environment
* Browser / client: [e.g., Chrome 120, Postman]
* Operating system: [e.g., macOS 14, Windows 11]
* App version / commit: [e.g., commit SHA or branch name]

## Screenshots or Logs
[Paste error logs, screenshots, or network responses if available]

## Additional Context
